creator: jase@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patches appear to be against a local ports tree. For example, the
net-mgmt/zabbix2-server patch is against net-mgmt/zabbix-server
v1.8.11_2,2 - a version that has never existed in the official ports tree.

Please regenerate the patches against the version of net-mgmt/zabbix
that was in the official ports tree at the time of your PR submission
(specifically, 1.8.13,2).

When regenerating these patches, please do NOT amend the top comments
header block and make sure to exclude the CVS directory (--exclude=CVS).
I would also recommend leaving the defaults as per
net-mgmt/zabbix-server (IPV6 and MySQL enabled).

Regards,

Jase Thew.
